auth.signInSubtitle: Enter your credentials to access your dashboard
auth.signUpSubtitle: Create your account in seconds. No approval required.
auth.heroDesc: Your AI Receptionist replies in seconds, answers from your knowledge base, and turns Messenger chats into booked appointments and qualified leads.

analytics.title: Dashboard
analytics.subtitle: Here's what's happening with your bot today.

aiUsage.title: AI Usage
aiUsage.subtitle: Track your bot's AI credit consumption.

credits.title: Credits & Billing
credits.subtitle: Your credit balance and recharge info.
credits.rechargeStep1: Contact the admin to request a recharge
credits.rechargeStep2: Send your payment using the agreed method
credits.rechargeStep3: Share your transaction reference — credits will be added to your account
credits.rechargeNote: Credits are usually updated within 1-2 hours.
credits.botIntro: When someone messages your Facebook page, our AI bot automatically replies.
credits.botCan2: Identify products from photos and reply with prices
credits.botCan4: Reply in the language you configured
credits.tip1: Set Auto-Reply rules for common questions (Free!)
credits.tip2: Add common questions to your FAQ list

botSettings.title: Bot Settings
botSettings.subtitle: Customize how your AI bot responds to customers.
botSettings.businessInfoDesc: Tell the AI about your business so it can represent you well.
botSettings.welcomeDesc: The first message customers receive when they message your page. Write it in the language you want the bot to use.
botSettings.customInstructionsDesc: Give the AI specific instructions on how to behave. Write in plain text.
botSettings.customInstructionsPh: e.g. Always mention free delivery for orders above $500. Don't discuss competitor products.
botSettings.commentFeedDesc: Control how the bot handles comments and page posts.
botSettings.aiCommentsDesc: Use AI to reply to comments intelligently instead of static text
botSettings.autoImportDesc: When you post a photo on your page, AI analyzes it and creates a pending product
botSettings.autoCreateOrdersDesc: AI detects buying intent in chat and creates a pending order automatically
botSettings.autoCreateComplaintsDesc: AI flags angry or problem messages as complaints for follow-up
botSettings.autoCreateLeadsDesc: AI extracts name, phone, address from conversations and saves as a lead
botSettings.fbConnectionDesc: Use these values when setting up your Facebook Webhook.
botSettings.webhookHint: Paste this in Facebook Developer App → Messenger → Webhooks → Callback URL
botSettings.eachPageHint: Each connected Facebook Page has its own unique Verify Token. Go to the FB Pages tab to see yours.
botSettings.businessCategoryDesc: Drives what your AI Receptionist knows and which leads it captures.

aiTraining.title: AI Training
aiTraining.subtitle: Train your bot with AI or configure manually.
aiTraining.saved: Settings saved! Bot will use these immediately.
aiTraining.wizardDesc: I'll ask you simple questions about your business and how you want the bot to reply. Then I'll configure everything automatically.
aiTraining.wizardHelper: Answer the questions → Click "Apply Settings" when done — it merges and saves automatically
aiTraining.paymentMethodsPh: Cash on Delivery, Card, Bank Transfer…
aiTraining.outOfStockPh: Sorry, this item is out of stock.
aiTraining.faqDesc: Add common questions customers ask. Use suggestions below to get started quickly.
aiTraining.templateLoaded: Loaded {{count}} starter fields. You can edit them anytime.
aiTraining.templateAllSet: Your knowledge base is already filled — nothing to load.

subtitleByCat.ecommerce: Train your store assistant to answer about products, delivery and payments.
subtitleByCat.dental: Train your clinic receptionist to answer patients and book appointments.
subtitleByCat.hvac: Train your dispatcher to qualify jobs and book service calls.
subtitleByCat.salon: Train your front-desk to answer clients and book appointments.

kbDesc.ecommerce: Shipping, payment and return information your bot will use.
kbDesc.dental: Hours, address, insurance and emergency policy your bot will use.
kbDesc.hvac: Service area, hours, emergency and pricing policy your bot will use.
kbDesc.salon: Hours, address, cancellation and deposit policy your bot will use.

aiTraining.cancellationPolicyPh: Please cancel at least 24 hours in advance.
aiTraining.emergencyAvailabilityPh: 24/7 emergency service available, surcharge after hours.
aiTraining.pricingPolicyPh: Free estimates. Diagnostic fee waived on repair.

dental.insuranceA: We accept most major plans. Share your provider and we'll confirm.
dental.emergencyA: Please call our emergency line at (555) 123-4567 right away.
dental.bookA: Of course — share your name, phone and a preferred day/time.

hvac.areaA: Share your ZIP code and we'll confirm right away.
hvac.emergencyA: We offer 24/7 emergency service. Share your address and we'll dispatch a tech.
hvac.estimate: Can I get a free estimate?
hvac.estimateA: Yes — estimates are free. Share the issue and your address to book a visit.

salon.book: I'd like to book an appointment.
salon.bookA: Happy to help — share your name, phone, service and a preferred day/time.
salon.cancelA: Please cancel at least 24 hours in advance to avoid a fee.
salon.deposit: Do I need to pay a deposit?
salon.depositA: A 20% deposit is required to confirm color and longer services.

aiTraining.chooseLanguageTitle: Which language should we chat in?
aiTraining.chooseLanguageDesc: I will keep replying in this language until you ask me to change.

autoReply.title: Auto-Reply Rules
autoReply.subtitle: Keyword-based instant replies (bypasses AI).
autoReply.keywordsHint: When a customer message contains any of these words, this reply is sent instantly.
autoReply.responseAltPh: Optional second-language version of the same reply…
autoReply.noRulesDesc: Add keyword triggers for instant responses. Use the templates above to get started!
autoReply.deliveryResp: We deliver within 2-3 business days. Standard delivery rates apply.
autoReply.paymentResp: We accept Cash on Delivery and other payment methods.
autoReply.returnResp: If there's any issue with the product, let us know within 3 days for a return or exchange.
autoReply.hoursResp: We're open every day from 10 AM to 10 PM.

products.title: Products
products.subtitle: Manage your product catalog.
products.name: Name
products.nameAltPh: Product name in a second language
products.colorVariantsHint: (Bot sends the exact color image customer asks for)
products.variantsImportant: Important: Write color name clearly (e.g. "Cream", "Pink", "Black"). The bot matches this name to send the correct image.
products.variantsExample: Example: Add "Cream" with cream product photo, "Pink" with pink product photo — bot sends the right one!
products.noSizeOptions: No size options yet. Add e.g. "50ml" → $100, "100ml" → $200
products.emptyDesc: Add products with images, categories, and let AI generate perfect descriptions for your bot.
products.toastFilledByAi: Product details filled by AI! Review and save.
products.toastVariantReady: Variant "{{color}}" ready — find "{{product}}" and add it.
products.wSubtitle: Upload images, chat, and I'll set up your product
products.wGreeting:
👋 Hi! I'm your Product AI Assistant!

📸 **Upload product images** (multiple at once!) and I'll analyze them — detect color, material, type — everything!

Or just tell me about the product and I'll help you set it up perfectly. What product do you want to add?
products.wInputPh: Describe your product or ask anything...
products.wUploadedOne: I uploaded {{count}} product image, please analyze it.
products.wUploadedMany: I uploaded {{count}} product images, please analyze them all.
products.wAdjustReply: No, let me adjust some details.
products.wErrorRetry: ❌ Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.
products.wCantProcess: I couldn't process that. Try again?

pendingProducts.title: Auto-Import Queue
pendingProducts.subtitle: Products detected from your page posts — review and approve.
pendingProducts.name: Name
pendingProducts.empty: Nothing pending — auto-imports will appear here.

suggestions.title: Product Suggestions

overview.title: Platform Overview

users.title: User Management
users.subtitle: Search, adjust credits, suspend, or remove users.
users.searchPlaceholder: Search by name or user ID…
users.deleteConfirmDesc: This removes the user and ALL their data (products, orders, pages, credits). This cannot be undone.

payments.title: Payments
payments.subtitle: Sell the bot via Stripe checkout — set up once.
payments.stripeDesc: Accept card payments globally. When you're ready, connect your Stripe account and we'll wire up subscriptions and credit top-ups automatically.
payments.willEnableLater: You can enable this later — leave it for now.

pricing.title: Pricing & Plans
pricing.subtitle: Global rates applied to every bot reply.
pricing.textCostHint: Charged when the bot sends a text-only message.
pricing.imageCostHint: Charged when the bot proactively sends a product image.
pricing.signupBonusHint: Credits automatically granted to every new user on signup.

fbPages.title: All Facebook Pages
fbPages.subtitle: Every page connected across all users.

subtitle.salon: Treatments and packages on the menu.

services.empty: No services yet. Add one or load the starter list.
services.notForEcommerce: This page is for service businesses. E-commerce uses the Products page.

leads.subtitle: Inquiries captured by your AI Receptionist.

autoLearn.title: Self-Learning
autoLearn.desc: Let the bot analyze your recent conversations and suggest improvements. Nothing is applied until you approve it.
autoLearn.pendingDesc: Approve to apply to your bot, reject to discard.
autoLearn.empty: No suggestions yet. Click Analyze to generate some.

trainBot.title: Train the bot
trainBot.desc: Tell the bot how it should have replied. Saved for your approval in AI Training.
trainBot.saved: Saved. Approve it in AI Training → Auto-Learn.
